name: skilling-it
description: Production-tested skills for Claude Code: controlled skill evaluation, security auditing, structured research, session checkpointing, and pre-flight discipline.
author: Eva Mishor <eva.mishor@gmail.com>

pluginGroups.name: Research
pluginGroups.description: Skills for keeping technical decisions current and well-informed

plugins.name: Tech Research
plugins.description: Research current state-of-the-art before implementing technical decisions. Prevents stale training-data recommendations.

pluginGroups.name: Session & Workflow
pluginGroups.description: Skills for managing long sessions and capturing learnings

plugins.name: Consolidate
plugins.description: Post-session learning extraction and memory management

plugins.name: Wait, What?
plugins.description: Session checkpoint — structured summary of what was done, why, and what's next

plugins.name: End of Day
plugins.description: End-of-day work summary with metrics and reflection

plugins.name: Tech to Social
plugins.description: Turn technical work into LinkedIn posts with hook patterns, tone selection, and series planning

plugins.name: PR Axes Review
plugins.description: 14-axis ship-time review fired after `gh pr create`. Tier by surprise risk, not severity. Diff-anchored, chat-only.

plugins.name: Pre-Clear
plugins.description: Pre-session-end checklist — documentation, learning capture, intelligent branch recommendations

plugins.name: Pre-Push
plugins.description: Comprehensive validation before pushing to remote

plugins.name: Repo Tidy-Up
plugins.description: Periodic repo health checklist — branches, dependencies, stale code, memory, docs

pluginGroups.name: Meta & Maintenance
pluginGroups.description: Skills about building, evaluating, and securing other skills

plugins.name: Skill Creator
plugins.description: Guide for creating effective skills with progressive disclosure

plugins.name: Bouncer
plugins.description: Security audit for vetting skills, plugins, hooks, and MCP servers before installation

plugins.name: Spring Clean
plugins.description: Harness-agnostic context-budget audit for agent sessions. Works for Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, opencode.

plugins.name: Eval Compare (talk demo)
plugins.description: Talk-demo A/B harness for skills. No repeats — not a real eval. Use Claude Code's `--evals` flag for serious skill evaluation. Kept as the worked example from the Nov 2025 WiDS-IL talk.
